info.description: Hexagonal Architecture REST API for a Virtual Store with RBAC, Image Uploads, Pricing & Discounts.
info.title: Virtual Store API

get.summary: Get audit logs for a specific product

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns Access/Refresh tokens plus user details

200.description: Returns login response with tokens and user details

post.description: Uses a refresh token to obtain a new pair of Access and Refresh tokens
Creates a new customer account with their details

post.summary: Add or update item in cart

post.description: Creates a new product category (Admin only)
Creates a new discount (percentage or fixed amount) for a product or category (Admin only)

get.description: Returns the discount details for a valid, active, non-expired coupon code (public)

get.summary: Download PDF Receipt for an Order

put.summary: Update shipping info and set to shipped (Admin/Seller)

get.summary: List inventory movements for a product
Get product final price with applied discount

post.summary: Add a review to a product

post.description: Register a stock entry, exit or manual adjustment (Admin/Seller)

get.description: Gets a list of all users and their profile data

post.description: Allows an existing Admin to create a new Admin account
Allows an Admin to create a new Seller with NIT and Company Name

discount.description: Discount at the time of purchase

price.description: Price at the time of purchase

user.description: Relación con el usuario que comenta
